ltl.title: LTL Freight Shipping Service
ltl.shortDescription: Cost-effective shipping solutions for smaller freight loads

hero.title: LTL Freight Shipping Service
hero.description: Portlandia Logistics' LTL services help you ship smart, combining access to a broad carrier network, powerful digital tools, and dedicated support to get your freight where it needs to go without the overhead of full-truckload costs.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Portlandia Logistics LTL?
whyChoose.subtitle: Reliable coverage, simplified booking, and full visibility designed to move your freight efficiently without added complexity.

items.title: Nationwide Network
items.description: Access a trusted network of regional and national carriers that ensures consistent capacity wherever you ship.

items.title: Fast, Easy Booking
items.description: Get instant quotes and book shipments in minutes through a streamlined digital experience.

items.title: Hassle-Free Coordination
items.description: We manage carrier communication, pickup, and delivery so you don't have to.

items.title: Real-Time Visibility
items.description: Track shipments and performance with clear, real-time data from pickup to delivery.

items.title: Extensive Carrier Coverage
items.description: Leverage a broad, vetted carrier network that delivers consistent LTL capacity across regions.

items.title: End-to-End Management
items.description: Our team oversees every shipment detail to ensure smooth execution from pickup to delivery.

whatIs.title: What Is LTL Shipping?
whatIs.description: Less-Than-Truckload (LTL) shipping is the economical way to move freight that's too large for parcel carriers but not enough to fill an entire truck. Your goods share space with other shipments, and costs are calculated based on the space used and handling requirements.

book.title: Simplified LTL Shipping
book.description: We make LTL shipping straightforward and predictable. With Portlandia Logistics, our guided booking experience walks you through quoting and scheduling step by step helping reduce guesswork around freight details, service options, and delivery requirements.

items.title: Easy Digital Experience
items.description: Our platform offers a guided workflow for quoting and booking that takes the guesswork out of freight class, accessorials, and delivery options so you ship confidently every time.

items.title: Reliable Coverage
items.description: We pair your freight with quality carriers that match your timeline and budget  helping you control costs without sacrificing service levels.

ftl.title: FTL Freight Shipping Service
ftl.shortDescription: Dedicated truck services for large shipments and time-sensitive deliveries

hero.title: FTL Freight Shipping Service
hero.description: Portlandia Logistics' FTL services provide dedicated truckload capacity for your large shipments, combining speed, security, and reliability. Get your freight delivered faster with dedicated trucks and drivers focused solely on your cargo.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Portlandia Logistics FTL?
whyChoose.subtitle: Dedicated capacity, direct delivery, and maximum security designed to move your full truckload freight efficiently and reliably.

items.title: Dedicated Capacity
items.description: Access reliable full truckload capacity with our extensive carrier network ensuring trucks when you need them.

items.title: Direct Delivery
items.description: Point-to-point transportation with no stops, ensuring your freight arrives faster and safer.

items.title: Complete Freight Security
items.description: Your shipment stays on one truck from pickup to delivery, minimizing handling and damage risk.

items.title: 24/7 Tracking
items.description: Monitor your shipment in real-time with GPS tracking and receive updates throughout the journey.

items.title: Flexible Equipment Options
items.description: Choose from dry vans, refrigerated trailers, flatbeds, and specialized equipment to meet your needs.

items.title: Expedited Service Available
items.description: Team drivers and expedited options ensure time-critical shipments arrive on schedule.

whatIs.title: What Is FTL Shipping?
whatIs.description: Full Truckload (FTL) shipping dedicates an entire truck exclusively to your freight. This service is ideal for large shipments, time-sensitive deliveries, or when you need the security and speed of direct transportation from origin to destination.

book.title: Simplified FTL Shipping
book.description: We make FTL shipping straightforward and reliable. With Portlandia Logistics, our dedicated booking platform connects you with trusted carriers, provides transparent pricing, and manages every detail from pickup to delivery ensuring your full truckload shipments move seamlessly.

items.title: Dedicated Capacity
items.description: Access to reliable carriers with the right equipment for your shipment. From dry vans to specialized trailers, we match your freight with the perfect truck every time.

items.title: Complete Transparency
items.description: Real-time tracking, clear communication, and proactive updates throughout your shipment's journey giving you complete visibility and peace of mind.

intermodal.title: Intermodal Transportation Service
intermodal.shortDescription: Efficient multi-modal shipping combining rail and truck transport

hero.title: Intermodal Transportation Service
hero.description: Portlandia Logistics' Intermodal services combine the cost efficiency of rail with the flexibility of truck transport, delivering sustainable and economical solutions for long-haul freight across the country.
highlights: Up to 30% cost savings vs. OTR

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Portlandia Logistics Intermodal?
whyChoose.subtitle: Cost-effective rail solutions, environmental sustainability, and seamless coordination designed to optimize your long-haul freight shipping.

items.title: Significant Cost Savings
items.description: Save up to 30% compared to over-the-road trucking on long-haul shipments through efficient rail transport.

items.title: Eco-Friendly Shipping
items.description: Reduce carbon emissions by up to 75% per ton-mile compared to traditional trucking methods.

items.title: Reliable Rail Schedules
items.description: Benefit from predictable transit times with our partnerships with major Class I railroads.

items.title: Complete Visibility
items.description: Track your containers throughout the entire journey with real-time updates from rail to final delivery.

items.title: Seamless Transitions
items.description: Our integrated drayage services ensure smooth handoffs between rail terminals and your facilities.

items.title: Peak Season Capacity
items.description: Access reliable capacity even during truck shortages with our extensive rail network.

whatIs.title: What Is Intermodal Transportation?
whatIs.description: Intermodal transportation combines rail and truck to move freight efficiently over long distances. By using rail for the long-haul portion and trucks for pickup and delivery, this method offers significant cost savings and environmental benefits while maintaining reliable service.

book.title: Simplified Intermodal Shipping
book.description: We make intermodal shipping straightforward and sustainable. With Portlandia Logistics, our comprehensive platform manages rail coordination, drayage scheduling, and container tracking from origin to destination making long-haul freight both economical and environmentally responsible.

items.title: Cost-Effective Long Haul
items.description: Rail provides significant cost advantages for shipments over 750 miles, with predictable pricing and reliable transit times that help you plan and budget effectively.

items.title: Sustainable Solution
items.description: Reduce your carbon footprint by up to 75% compared to over-the-road trucking while maintaining service quality and on-time delivery performance.

drayage.title: Drayage Services
drayage.shortDescription: Short-distance container transport to and from ports and rail yards

hero.title: Professional Drayage Services
hero.description: Portlandia Logistics' Drayage services ensure efficient container movement to and from ports and rail terminals. Our experienced drivers and modern equipment handle the critical first and last mile of your intermodal shipments.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Portlandia Logistics Drayage?
whyChoose.subtitle: Port expertise, fast turnaround, and complete compliance designed to keep your containers moving efficiently through critical first and last mile.

items.title: Port-Certified Drivers
items.description: Our experienced, certified drivers navigate complex port operations and terminal requirements with ease.

items.title: Quick Container Pickup
items.description: Fast turnaround times minimize dwell fees and keep your supply chain moving without delays.

items.title: Chassis Pool Access
items.description: Direct access to chassis equipment ensures no delays waiting for availability at terminals.

items.title: 24/7 Terminal Coverage
items.description: Round-the-clock operations ensure your containers move regardless of terminal hours or schedules.

items.title: Full Regulatory Compliance
items.description: Licensed, insured, and bonded with complete adherence to all port regulations and safety standards.

items.title: Detention Management
items.description: Strategic planning and coordination to minimize costly detention and demurrage charges.

whatIs.title: What Is Drayage?
whatIs.description: Drayage is the short-distance transport of shipping containers between ports, rail terminals, and your facility—typically within a 50-mile radius. It's the critical first and last mile connection in the intermodal supply chain, ensuring your containers move efficiently through the transportation network.

book.title: Simplified Drayage Services
book.description: We make drayage straightforward and efficient. With Portlandia Logistics, our experienced team handles port appointments, chassis management, and terminal coordination ensuring your containers move quickly through the critical first and last mile without costly delays.

items.title: Port Expertise
items.description: Our certified drivers and operations team navigate complex terminal requirements, ensuring fast turnaround times and minimal dwell fees at major ports and rail yards.

items.title: Detention Avoidance
items.description: Strategic planning and coordination minimize costly detention and demurrage charges through efficient scheduling and proactive container management.
